labels: enhancement

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the gap or friction. What can't you do today, or what's harder than it should be? -->

## What would you like to happen?

<!-- Describe the behaviour or change you're proposing. -->

## Are you willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR
- [ ] No, flagging it for someone else to pick up

## Context

<!-- Provider, OS, use case — anything that helps understand the request. -->

---

> Keep in mind this is early-stage software. Simple, focused requests are more likely to get picked up than large redesigns. If you can implement it, a PR is always faster than an issue.
